expo.name: Style AI
expo.description: Style AI helps users manage wardrobes and get personalized style suggestions.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Style AI needs camera access so you can capture outfit and wardrobe photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Style AI needs photo library access so you can select wardrobe images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Style AI uses location to provide weather-aware style recommendations.
